name: opencode-bettergrep
description: Standalone OpenCode plugin that ports the advanced local grep implementation from oh-my-opencode-slim.

scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true})" && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --external @opencode-ai/plugin && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly
scripts.lint: biome lint src package.json README.md biome.json tsconfig.json
scripts.check: biome check src package.json README.md biome.json tsconfig.json
scripts.format: biome format src package.json README.md biome.json tsconfig.json --write
